## 🔗 Related Issue

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🤖 New master (adding a new investment/technical/signal master)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have run `ruff check .` and fixed all lint issues
- [ ] I have run `python -m pytest tests/test_smoke.py` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added entries to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
